summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Familie Dahrendorf family travel website. Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed). Frontend: 100% working - all navigation, pages, maps, images, and features functioning correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Chat toggle button at position y=1008px can be blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay. Works when clicking via JavaScript or on mobile viewport.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Minor UX issue, chat functionality works correctly

issues: Google Maps deprecation warning for google.maps.Marker (deprecated Feb 2024, recommend AdvancedMarkerElement) - not a functional issue

passed_tests: Navigation: 5 tabs (Start, Route, Planen, Packen, Familie) work correctly on desktop and mobile
Start page: Hero section with countdown (153 Tage), quick stats (26 Tage, 9 Stopps, Tipps, 5 Abenteurer), family avatars, quick links
Route page: Google Maps displays with numbered markers for 9 stops, optional Alex-Tipps markers toggleable, Reiseverlauf list, DirectionsRenderer route line
Planen page: Two tabs - Reiseplan (10 itinerary items in timeline) and Tipps (3 suggestion cards with IMAGES)
Tipps images: Mt. St. Helens (1153x720), Leavenworth (6000x4000), Yellowstone (474x315) - ALL VISIBLE from customer-assets.emergentagent.com
Suggestion toggle add/remove from trip works correctly
Packen page: Packing lists with categories (Kleidung, Toilettenartikel, Elektronik, etc), toggle items, add new items
Familie page: Shows 5 family members (Lukas, Laura parents, Louie, Levi, Noah children)
Chat widget: Floating button opens chat window with AI assistant (Reise-Assistent)
Mobile bottom navigation: Tab bar positioned at bottom (y=788px on 844px viewport)
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps: Using deprecated google.maps.Marker instead of AdvancedMarkerElement - works but future-proofing recommended
Packing list title shows '2025' instead of '2026' in seed data - minor data inconsistency

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 9 API tests passed (family, trips, suggestions, packing-lists, chat)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, all features functional

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing default data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major functionality verified working. Suggestion images (Mt. St. Helens, Leavenworth, Yellowstone) now loading correctly from customer-assets.emergentagent.com. Navigation redesign with 5 tabs working on both desktop (floating pill) and mobile (bottom bar). Chat widget functional with AI assistant. Previous iteration had Select component validation issues - those appear resolved in current implementation.
